task_completion.description: Open the User Profile in ArkCase
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase application is open in a browser and the User Profile page or dropdown menu is visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Out-of-Office delegation settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Out-of-Office or Delegation settings panel, tab, or modal is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select Sally Acm as the delegate
task_completion.visual_evidence: The delegate input field shows 'Sally Acm', 'sally-acm', or 'sally-acm@dev.arkcase.com' selected.

task_completion.description: Set the start date to today
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start date field is filled with the current system date (matching the OS clock in the screenshot).

task_completion.description: Set the end date to 7 days from now
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end date field is filled with a date exactly 7 days after the start date.
A success message/notification is displayed, or the new delegation is visible in a list of active/saved delegations.

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase web interface to configure the delegation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ArkCase web UI in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the ArkCase application running, not a text editor or a static mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target delegate is Sally Acm (username: sally-acm@dev.arkcase.com). The delegation must be configured in the ArkCase web interface. The start date should be the current system date, and the end date should be exactly 7 days after the start date.
